MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Mary Gilespy
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kim Mosteiro, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Norman Nayfach, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
